results.title: Indian Legend Drops MS Dhoni Bombshell, Accuses CSK of Misleading Fans
results.description: Former Indian captain Krishnamachari Srikkanth heavily criticised the Chennai Super Kings management, including captain Ruturaj Gaikwad and coach Stephen Fleming, for misleading fans about MS Dhoni's availability during the IPL season.

results.title: Governor’s Address Marks Second Day of 16th Assam Legislative Assembly Session
results.description: The second day of the 16th Assam Legislative Assembly session began today with the traditional address by Governor Lakshman Prasad Acharya. Delivering his speech in Assamese, the Governor extended warm congratulations to all newly elected MLAs who won through the democratic process. He described the BJP’s victory in the recently concluded Assembly elections as historic. [...]

results.title: Meghalaya CM Initiates Foundation Work for Major Rs 150-Crore Tura Development Project
Gaming studio Bungie to fire staff amid 'Destiny 2' shutdown
results.description: Bungie, the studio behind the popular Destiny franchise, is reportedly planning a round of layoffs.

results.title: Government mulls single entrance exam for engineering, medical courses
results.description: The central government is mulling over a proposal to introduce a single entrance examination for engineering and medical courses.

results.title: Is Meta building its own version of Reddit?
results.description: Meta has quietly launched a new app called Forum. The app was discovered by Geekout Newsletter's Matt Navarra in the App Store.

results.title: Service Tax Not Payable on Un-Invoiced Allocations By Foreign Parent Company Without Service And Consideration: CESTAT [Read Order]
results.description: The Chennai Bench of the Customs, Excise and Service Tax Appellate CESTAT held that service tax cannot be levied on mere accounting allocations by foreign parent companies without proof of actual service and consideration.
